title: senecio retrorsus
intro: Senecio retrorsus, also known as the Woolly Groundsel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and serve as an expectorant. The health benefits of Senecio retrorsus include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate allergies, and support the immune system. Senecio retrorsus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
